new_content.name: New Video Alert
new_content.text:
💦 NEW CONTENT DROPPED! GET READY TO CUM...
with MOTIVATION 🔥 We've added 5 fresh videos to the library. These are EXCLUSIVE and won't be available for long. Come get your fix before they're gone... 🍆💦

purchase_reminder.name: Purchase Reminder
purchase_reminder.text:
🍆 I KNOW YOU WANT MORE...
You've been teasing with FREE videos. Time to go ALL THE WAY. Unlock 100 premium videos for just $14.99! 🎁 BONUS: Free "Success Mindset" E-book (it's dirtier than you think) 😏

referral.name: Referral Bonus
referral.text:
👅 REFER A FRIEND... GET REWARDED
For every friend you refer who buys a pack, you get 5 FREE VIDEOS! Share this bot with your horny friends and earn rewards. The more the merrier... 😈

inactive_users.name: Inactive Users Re-engagement
inactive_users.text:
💀 WE MISS YOUR DIRTY FACE...
You haven't come for 7 days. I have NEW videos waiting just for you. 🔥 "Don't let your dreams be dreams. Wake up and GRIND." I saved the hottest one for you... 😏

purchase_confirmation.name: Purchase Confirmation
purchase_confirmation.text:
🎉 PURCHASE CONFIRMED! YOU'RE OFFICIALLY HOOKED
Your {pack_name} has been activated! You now have access to premium videos. Ready to explode with success? 🎬💦
